BatchIncreaseElasticNetworkCardIntranetI.eniId: The ID of the elastic network interface
BatchIncreaseElasticNetworkCardIntranetI.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
BatchIncreaseElasticNetworkCardIntranetI.isIpv6: Whether to assign an IPv6 address. true assigns an IPv6 address; defaults to false for IPv4
BatchIncreaseElasticNetworkCardIntranetI.privateIpAddresses: Specified private IP address information, up to 10 per request. At least one of privateIpAddresses or privateIpAddressCount must be provided
BatchIncreaseElasticNetworkCardIntranetI.privateIpAddressCount: Number of new private IP addresses to request, maximum 10. At least one of privateIpAddresses or privateIpAddressCount must be provided
